assertions.assertion: Server-side code contains '.AddBffBlazorClient()' in the service configuration
assertions.rationale: .AddBffBlazorClient() is chained on the server-side BFF builder

assertions.assertion: Client-side code contains 'AddBffBlazorClient' with polling interval set to 30 seconds (TimeSpan.FromSeconds(30))
assertions.rationale: AddBffBlazorClient with Polling.Interval = TimeSpan.FromSeconds(30) on the client
AddBff().ConfigureOpenIdConnect() is present on the server
